offer.name: SoftJunk Lead Follow-Up Kit or Custom 7-Day Lead Follow-Up Sequence
offer.delivery: Manual delivery after the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction.

safe_to_execute_when: The buyer explicitly wants the SoftJunk 5 USD offer.
The buyer accepts PayPal.Me as the payment provider.
The buyer understands delivery starts only after seller-side PayPal evidence exists.
steps: Use PayPal note Lead Follow-Up Kit for the digital kit.

Use https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/ai-deal-desk.html when non-sensitive lead context is ready and the buyer needs a decision, PayPal note, custom preview route, and shareable order link before paying.
Use https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/agent-commerce.html when an assistant, VA, crawler, or buyer needs the compact commerce contract before paying.

Use the generated note from https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/ai-deal-desk.html, https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/custom-sequence-gallery.html, https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/custom-sequence-preview.html, or https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/shareable-order-link.html for a custom sequence.
Do not claim payment or delivery until seller-side PayPal verification succeeds.

verification.current_static_manifest_state: This manifest is not seller-side proof that a transaction has arrived.
verification.rule: Fulfillment remains closed until seller-side PayPal evidence verifies the 5 USD transaction.
